Switzerland managed to make it out of their group in the last edition of the FIFA World Cup and is expected to do the same this year as well. Switzerland is placed in Group G along with Brazil, Serbia, and Cameroon. While this is not the easiest of groups, Switzerland is still expected to make it out of the group stages into the knockout rounds.
Switzerland goalkeeper Yann Sommer was crucial for the team in the 2018 FIFA World Cup and the Swiss fans will hope that the Monchengladbach goalkeeper can help take them even further this time around.
Who Is Switzerland’s Head Coach?
Switzerland’s head coach is Murat Yakin. Murat Yakin was appointed as Switzerland’s head coach in August 2021. This isn’t Yakin’s first managing role. He was also the manager of prominent clubs like Basel and Spartak Moscow before becoming Switzerland’s head coach.
